query:
UPDATE intake_records
SET labels = CASE
  -- Weekend (Sat/Sun in Eastern time)
  WHEN DAYOFWEEK(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-04:00')) IN (1, 7)
    THEN JSON_ARRAY('after_hours', 'weekend')
  -- Weekday but outside 9am-6pm Eastern
  WHEN HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-04:00')) < 9
    OR HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-04:00')) >= 18
    THEN JSON_ARRAY('after_hours')
  -- Business hours: no label
  ELSE JSON_ARRAY()
END
WHERE routingMethod != 'extension' OR routingMethod IS NULL;

-- Keep direct_voicemail label for extension calls, but also add after_hours if applicable
UPDATE intake_records
SET labels = CASE
  WHEN DAYOFWEEK(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-04:00')) IN (1, 7)
    THEN JSON_ARRAY('after_hours', 'weekend', 'direct_voicemail')
  WHEN HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-04:00')) < 9
    OR HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(createdAt, '+00:00', '-04:00')) >= 18
    THEN JSON_ARRAY('after_hours', 'direct_voicemail')
  ELSE JSON_ARRAY('direct_voicemail')
END
WHERE routingMethod = 'extension';
